input: Imagine a self-contained, hypothetical world with only the following conditions, and without any unmentioned factors or causal relationships: Rixq has a direct effect on xevu. Zuph has a direct effect on xevu. For those who are not rixq, the probability of xevu is 44%. For those who are rixq, the probability of xevu is 24%. Will rixq decrease the chance of xevu?
